name: finvantage
description: Invoice processing system using AWS Serverless, Textract, Bedrock, RDS and ElastiCache

scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:auth:local
scripts.test:unit: node --test tests/frontendUiHelpers.test.js tests/itemNormalization.test.js tests/textractExpense.test.js tests/spendingPlan.service.test.js tests/spendingPlanFrontendHelpers.test.js tests/authMode.test.js tests/authLambda.unit.test.js tests/awsError.unit.test.js tests/bedrockProfile.unit.test.js tests/cors.unit.test.js tests/dataInfrastructure.unit.test.js tests/databaseUserBootstrap.unit.test.js tests/dbConfig.production.test.js tests/dbSecret.unit.test.js tests/importHandler.unit.test.js tests/invoiceUploadValidation.unit.test.js tests/migrationRunner.unit.test.js tests/ocrError.unit.test.js tests/productionConfig.unit.test.js tests/productionSafety.unit.test.js tests/redisClient.unit.test.js tests/settingsPreferences.test.js tests/uploadPipeline.unit.test.js tests/expenseCategories.test.js tests/transactionsFrontendHelpers.test.js tests/transactionValidation.unit.test.js tests/transactionContracts.unit.test.js tests/invoiceCrudHandlers.unit.test.js
